title: Potato Gem Casserole
ingredients: Lazy garlic - as much as you desire
method: In a large skillet/frying pan on med-high heat, cook onion, garlic and beef until brown and starting to crisp.
Once beef is cooked, add seasoning and flour. Stir until flour is coating the beef.
Add tomato paste, and salt and pepper.
Add in beef broth, and mix until combined.
Add in frozen vegetables and cooked until no longer frozen.
Remove from the heat and position frozen potato gems over the top of the beef & vegetable mix.
Bake until potato gems are golden brown - approx 20 minutes.
Add enough shredded cheese to lightly cover the gems and bake until melted and browning - approx 5-10 minutes.
notes: Serve with a healthy dollop of cream cheese.
